title: The Ageless Warrior Lab Podcast: Building Companies That Promote Prosperity With a Purpose
summary: David Meyer interviews Eric for episode 39 of The Ageless Warrior Lab, exploring how martial arts principles of constant enhancement connect to building incorruptible companies.
blockquote: I had a great talk with Eric Ries about his new book which is all about how to protect the mission of your company (or anything people build). The book is called Incorruptible and presales have started.
